item.title: Fineotex Chemical Ltd Falls 7.04%: 4 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Fineotex Chemical Ltd experienced a challenging week from 2 to 6 March 2026, closing at Rs.21.93, down 7.04% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.23.59. This decline notably outpaced the Sensex’s 3.00% fall over the same period, reflecting intensified selling pressure amid bearish technical signals and cautious market sentiment. Time: Mar 14 2026 05:24 PM IST

item.title: Sri Adhikari Brothers Television Network Ltd Falls 9.94%: 4 Key Events Shaping the Week
item.description: Sri Adhikari Brothers Television Network Ltd (SABTN) endured a turbulent week from 2 to 6 March 2026, with its share price declining sharply by 9.94% to close at Rs.108.40, significantly underperforming the Sensex’s 3.00% fall. The stock experienced two lower circuit hits and two upper circuit triggers amid heavy selling and buying pressures, reflecting heightened volatility and mixed investor sentiment in a challenging market environment. Time: Mar 14 2026 05:24 PM IST

item.title: Lancor Holdings Ltd’s Volatile Week: -0.62% Amid Circuit Hits and Market Swings
item.description: Lancor Holdings Ltd experienced a turbulent week from 2 to 6 March 2026, closing marginally lower by 0.62% at Rs.23.90 despite significant intraday volatility marked by both lower and upper circuit hits. The stock notably outperformed the Sensex, which declined 3.00% over the same period, reflecting a mixed sentiment amid heavy selling pressure early in the week and a sharp rebound midweek driven by strong buying interest. Time: Mar 14 2026 05:24 PM IST

item.title: Jindal Saw Ltd Falls 9.89%: 2 Key Factors Driving the Weekly Decline
item.description: Jindal Saw Ltd experienced a challenging week from 2 to 6 March 2026, with its share price declining by 9.89% to close at Rs.166.65, significantly underperforming the Sensex which fell 3.00% over the same period. The week was marked by a sharp gap down opening on Monday amid market concerns and a continuation of bearish technical momentum by Friday, reflecting persistent selling pressure and volatile market conditions. Time: Mar 14 2026 05:24 PM IST

item.title: Evexia Lifecare Ltd Declines 0.67% Amidst Valuation Reset and Market Pressure
item.description: Evexia Lifecare Ltd’s stock closed the week marginally lower by 0.67% at Rs.1.49, underperforming the broader Sensex which declined 3.00%. The week was marked by the stock hitting a fresh 52-week low and a notable shift in valuation metrics from expensive to fair, reflecting ongoing challenges in profitability and market sentiment. Time: Mar 14 2026 05:24 PM IST

item.title: Edelweiss Financial Services Ltd Falls 4.41%: Downgrade and Technical Shifts Shape the Week
item.description: Edelweiss Financial Services Ltd closed the week ending 6 March 2026 at Rs.109.45, down 4.41% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.114.50. This underperformance slightly exceeded the Sensex’s 3.00% decline over the same period, reflecting a week marked by a downgrade in rating, technical momentum shifts, and a significant gap down in price amid market concerns. Time: Mar 14 2026 05:24 PM IST

item.title: ICICI Bank Ltd. Declines 4.76% Amid High Trading Volumes and Mixed Derivatives Activity
item.description: ICICI Bank Ltd. closed the week ending 6 March 2026 at Rs.1,313.35, down 4.76% from the previous Friday’s close of Rs.1,379.00. This decline outpaced the Sensex’s 3.00% fall over the same period, reflecting a challenging week marked by sustained selling pressure, technical weakness, and mixed investor sentiment despite robust trading volumes and active derivatives positioning. Time: Mar 14 2026 05:23 PM IST

item.title: Swan Defence Surges 16.85% Amid Four-Day Rally and Upper Circuit Hits
item.description: Swan Defence and Heavy Industries Ltd delivered a remarkable weekly performance, surging 16.85% from ₹1,723.90 to ₹2,014.35 between 2 and 6 March 2026. This rally significantly outpaced the Sensex, which declined 3.00% over the same period, underscoring the stock’s strong relative strength amid a broadly weak market. The week was marked by multiple upper circuit hits, fresh 52-week highs, and a complex technical momentum landscape that investors should carefully analyse. Time: Mar 14 2026 05:23 PM IST

item.title: Automobile Corporation Of Goa Ltd Gains 0.93%: 3 Key Technical and Fundamental Factors Driving the Week
item.description: Automobile Corporation Of Goa Ltd closed the week with a modest gain of 0.93%, ending at Rs.1,686.00 on 6 March 2026, outperforming the Sensex which declined 3.00% over the same period. The stock experienced a volatile week marked by an upgrade in analyst rating, shifts in technical momentum, and mixed price movements amid broader market weakness. Time: Mar 14 2026 05:23 PM IST
